Well, jumping into it, um, we're with Maven AI, um, so the products that we have in our suite are all really built to for automation.
They're built to save your team's time, to give your team time back, to increase um exposure for your profiles, and really optimize the profiles.
So within MAVEN, uh, we have a couple different uh products.
So the Google Business AI tools, the one that we've talked with most of your team about.
We also have a social posting tool that automates posts to your social profiles.
Then we have a reputation tool, and we have a listings management tool.
Um, so I believe that that the goal for today was to cover our Google Business automation, and then our social automation tool, and how those those work um together.

Um, so first things first, where all of this information is coming from and how we're getting information to post on your behalf is all through direct syndication to your property management software.

So that's one differentiator of our Google Business and our social tools is that really the source of truth for all of the information that we're pulling, pricing, availability, photos, amenity-based information is all pulled directly from your feed.

So, implementation is as easy as turning the feed on, allowing Google and social page access, and then our team takes it over from there to really automate the whole process of optimizing all of your profiles.
And I believe it was Yardi that you guys are using, Rent Cafe.
Yeah, OK.
For whatever reason, you don't
have the full suite of photos within your feed.
We get this question all the time.
We always, always cross reference your website to upon implementation to see if there's more photos because this is a Google and social product, it's Um, the more photos, the better.
So we always cross reference websites too, but the source of truth for everything is, is the p.m. syndication.
Yeah.
And then the reasons
behind the product, so why we've had so many customers roll us out over the last year or so, um, is really because there's more and more emphasis on the Google Business profiles.
We've had more customers telling us that they're really focusing on the profiles.
Um, reason for that being Google tells us that your Google Business profile itself has the highest influence overall on your local SEO.
Um, and Google's actually using the content that lives on your profile, um, as one of the sources for answering SEO uh queries, as well as the AI overviews.
So, when people are looking at AI overviews, the content that's coming up in those answers, Google the Google Business profile is one of the sources.

So that really just speaks to the importance of pushing amenity-based information, getting your keywords throughout the profile as many times as you can, as well as getting accurate, up to date information for pricing and availability.
So when people are searching that, Google can can look at the profile and get those answers.

Google also looks at in rewards based on a few different factors, um, so they want the content you're posting to be relevant to the business, so property specific, and they look at frequency and uniqueness.

So I bring up the uniqueness piece, um, because they're really looking at is the content you're posting on your profiles truly unique to this profile, or are you posting the same thing throughout multiple uh multiple profiles?
So, because we know all of that, that's how we've built this tool, and that's really where we point um everything that we're doing towards is what Google is looking for.
So, using the automation and your feed syndication, coupled with our AI tool, we are automating a few different places throughout the profile.

One of them being daily automated posts, another being the products feed with pricing and availability, another being uh the Q&A, so we're automating the Q&A section, and then we're also pulling concessions directly from the feed to your profile.
So I thought it might make sense to show a live example of this.
Um, and a property that we have live, so you can really see uh where this lives on the profile.
So, we'll start with the products feed.
So in the products feed, coupled with the feed syndication, we're showing uh live pricing and availability at the at the floor plan level.
So you can see these are all available floor plans that this property has right now.

With descriptions and all of these point back to your website.
